hswm_baseline.mandatory_predecessor_gate: B2.2 neutral exact replay plus full-candidate score-component pack

candidates.mechanism: Separate query-conditioned entity and n-ary relation lanes followed by bounded bidirectional incidence expansion.
paper_code_drift: dense chunk VDB is populated but absent from public query
non-hybrid query modes and delete schema contain broken paths
candidates.hswm_surface: A2 optional dual V/E retrieval branch
candidates.falsifier: Under matched embeddings, candidates, and tokens, V-union-E must beat E-only and shuffled incidence on arity>=3 items.

candidates.mechanism: Query-weighted normalized entity-to-passage hypergraph diffusion plus dense residual and structural range filter.
paper_code_drift: public default discards entity similarity via multihot seeds
public parameters differ from paper table
no license or paper-run manifest
candidates.hswm_surface: A2 normalized V-to-E-to-V traversal falsifier behind mu=0
candidates.falsifier: Real incidence must beat degree-preserving shuffled incidence without harming the simple-factual control.

candidates.mechanism: Similarity and shared-entity relatedness trees materialized as two evidence-preserving mounts and a typed union.
paper_code_drift: trees flatten into a cosine pool rather than persistent horizontal edges
training pipeline absent
persist and traversal paths drift
candidates.falsifier: The union must beat the best single mount and shuffled entity membership under equal calls, nodes, and tokens.

candidates.mechanism: Compile fact-member and dense evidence-unit seeds separately, then optionally run certified associative PPR.
paper_code_drift: current main is v2 plus later platform work
pairwise topology drops predicate semantics
incremental synonym update searches all entities
candidates.hswm_surface: A2 typed seed compiler plus optional PPR
candidates.falsifier: Associative gain must survive predicate-preserving n-ary topology, vanish under shuffled membership, and not lower simple factual recall.

candidates.mechanism: History-preserving fact validity interval plus ingestion observation time and episode provenance.
paper_code_drift: current OSS is broader than paper evaluation
hosted Zep results are not Graphiti-only results
timestamp and contradiction extraction are partly LLM-derived
candidates.hswm_surface: A3 governance event plus L0 evidence reference
candidates.falsifier: Temporal-QA CI lower bound must be positive versus the current late filter while non-temporal retention loss is <=1 percentage point.

candidates.mechanism: Integration facade and benchmark receipt shape for a hosted temporal memory service.
paper_code_drift: repository is examples and integrations, not the evaluated product engine
cloud API is required for product claims
candidates.falsifier: A wrapper and direct HSWM call must be bit-identical apart from transport metadata; wrapper behavior is not memory uplift.

candidates.mechanism: Deterministic candidate view constrained to a requested revision or time slice.
paper_code_drift: multi-time dispatch references undefined symbols
multiple modes route through single-time query
node and edge state are mixed
no license
candidates.falsifier: Gain must disappear under shuffled timestamps and all dual/multi-time paths must execute without undefined symbols.

candidates.mechanism: Small query-conditioned graph scorer used only as an optional residual over the admitted flat score.
paper_code_drift: repository mixes paper model with later G-reasoner work
paper-scale pretraining is heavy and offline
candidates.falsifier: Gain must survive unseen held-out graphs and collapse under edge permutation versus flat cosine and the current B2 scorer.

candidates.mechanism: Receipt binding observation, extracted facts, invalidations, retrieved memory, plan, action, and reward.
paper_code_drift: main pipeline is triplet graph
n-ary Hypergraph class is orphaned
outdated facts are destructively deleted
candidates.falsifier: Under fixed model and tokens, reward must beat full-history and flat controls and collapse when action-outcome links are shuffled.

candidates.mechanism: Summary-first answer path with fail-closed escalation to source-linked raw evidence and optional verified write-back.
paper_code_drift: raw store is not cryptographically immutable
simple and full routers differ
verified write-back defaults off
vendored mem0 needs separate notice audit
candidates.hswm_surface: L3 evidence allocator plus L0 source receipt
candidates.falsifier: Versus raw-only, accuracy loss <=2.2 points with token or latency gain; broken raw pointers must refuse; router must beat random at matched escalation.

candidates.mechanism: Independent TP/FP/FN claim packet with rationale and frozen-source byte spans.
paper_code_drift: generation-time source identity is lost
post-hoc mutable web retrieval
same-model evaluation
similarity is mislabeled as provenance quality
candidates.falsifier: Injected unsupported and omitted claims must be caught, spans must byte-match frozen source, and shuffled response-context pairs must collapse the score.

prohibitions: No candidate may become active from source presence alone.
Do not copy code from NO-LICENSE or CC-BY-NC sources.
Do not attribute hosted Zep results to the Graphiti or zep clone alone.
Do not enable traversal or deep GNN by default.
Do not call post-hoc similarity or same-model critique proof.
Do not delete superseded source evidence.
